title: Fist of Fear, Touch of Death
original_title: Fist of Fear, Touch of Death
overview: A television reporter interviews fighters and promoters about Bruce Lee in preparation for a tournament to claim the title of “Successor to the Bruce Lee legacy”. Footage from Bruce Lee's films and interviews is repurposed in pseudo-documentary style.
